title: Would like to hire someone to set up our CRM
excerpt: I would like to hire someone to set up our CRM - which is a little out of the ordinary and would like to include some segments that take place after the Win/lose segment - more so along the lines of the segments that tak…

posts.author: GARYWEINBERG (Gary)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to hire someone to set up our CRM - which is a little out of the ordinary and would like to include some segments that take place after the Win/lose segment - more so along the lines of the segments that take place up until the implementation of the project, and then possibly for communication after the job is done. What we would like is pretty much planned out, just looking for someone with the experience to set it up for us in the next couple of weeks before our season gets overwhelming (landscaping company)rather than trying to figure it out ourselves and not being able to implement it in time.

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
@GARYWEINBERG I’d love to setup your teams CRM; we have worked with many services companies like yourself and would be happy to build and customize your CRM.

You can book some time here for an initial free consult and discuss working together: Calendly - Tim Little

We have some special CRM pricing that makes it easy to get started, deliver and train your team on using monday.com CRM!

I look forward to hearing from you!

posts.author: Carson (Carson Butcher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Gary,

We’re an advanced delivery partner (monday sales crm implementors), and CarbonWeb’s bread and butter is CRM, and crew deployment flows are a common use case we help implement - Landscaping especially.

Get a free workflow exploration

We do custom scopes, but we also have a CRM built out on top of the monday sales CRM (learn more) that I think might be exactly what you need.

Get a demo

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @GARYWEINBERG

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out! thespelas.com is a certified Advanced Services Delivery and official USA Solution Partner, with more than 6 years of experience in the platform.

We have a great depth of experience in setting up complex yet easy to use CRMs, and I am sure we can help create something really nice for your company to optimize your workflows.

Please do schedule an initial Free Consulting Session with us here so we can better discuss your vision and requirements! Alternatively, if none of the available time slots work out for you, please contact us at info@thespelas.com so we can do our best to accommodate you.

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: okojava88 (Davis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Gary:

I would like to hire someone to set up our CRM - which is a little out of the ordinary and would like to include some segments that take place after the Win/lose segment - more so along the lines of the segments that take place up until the implementation of the project, and then possibly for communication after the job is done. What we would like is pretty much planned out, just looking for someone with the experience to set it up for us in the next couple of weeks before our season gets overwhelming (landscaping company)rather than trying to figure it out ourselves and not being able to implement it in time.

Maybe You might want to consider working with partner crm implementation consultant who has experience in customizing and setting up CRM systems to match your specific needs.
This is someone with experience who can set up your CRM system according to your needs, making sure everything works smoothly for your business. They can help with customizing workflows, adding special steps, and integrating anything you need, including communication after the job is done.

posts.author: Kofi (Kofi FiftyTechSolutions.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @GARYWEINBERG

I am a full-time Certified monday.com Consultant, Expert, and Partner, and have helped clients like yourself for the last 5 years.

I am British, based in the UK, so communication is going to be easy.

Feel free to visit my website at FiftyTechSolutions.com or contact me directly here.

If you haven’t started using monday, you can get a free-trial here too.
